name: line-oss-crm
description: Open-source LINE Official Account CRM/marketing automation

scripts.test: pnpm --filter worker test && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter @line-harness/sdk test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter worker test:coverage && pnpm --filter web test:coverage
scripts.db:migrate:worker-local: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler d1 execute line-crm --local --file=../../packages/db/schema.sql
